title: How do I associate a company in CRM with a project in DEV?
excerpt:
Hi All, 
Apologies if this is simple and I’ve missed it. We are just testing the DEV and CRM apps to see if they suit our business needs, but we can’t locate how to associate / attach a project within the DEV section wit…

posts.author: UKFOX-e (Dave Sweet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
Apologies if this is simple and I’ve missed it. We are just testing the DEV and CRM apps to see if they suit our business needs, but we can’t locate how to associate / attach a project within the DEV section with a customer within the CRM.

How do we do this please?

Many Thanks

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Dave,

Welcome to the Monday community!

You can use the connect column feature in Monday. Start by setting up a two-way connect column between your ‘projects’ board and ‘contacts’ (or CRM) board. Ensure that this connection allows multiple connections as needed, for example, one project to many contacts or vice versa.
Let me know incase you need any more clarifications.

Cheers,
Harsh

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com
